title: festuca masatierrae
intro: Festuca masatierrae, also known as Spanish Needle Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce infection. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Festuca masatierrae is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be used in aromatherapy, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
